mapper.select: SELECT * FROM characters ORDER BY required_stamps ASC
SELECT c.* FROM characters c JOIN user_characters uc ON c.id = uc.character_id WHERE uc.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY uc.obtained_at ASC
SELECT * FROM characters WHERE required_stamps = #{count} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_characters (id, user_id, character_id, obtained_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{userId}, #{characterId}, #{obtainedAt})
